zh.lifeSummary: 當Ensign Timothy Baldwin於1689年11月20日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本時，他的父親Timothy Baldwin28歲，母親Elizabeth Hill28歲。他於1713年6月10日與Hannah Richardson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可斯同哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1750年12月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可斯同哈姆享年61歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可斯同哈姆笛卡爾 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ensign Timothy Baldwin于1689年11月20日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本时，他的父亲Timothy Baldwin28岁，母亲Elizabeth Hill28岁。他于1713年6月10日与Hannah Richardson在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可斯同哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1750年12月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可斯同哈姆享年61岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可斯同哈姆笛卡爾 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Baldwin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and North German: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements bald ‘bold, brave’ + wine ‘friend’, which was extremely popular among the Normans and in Flanders in the early Middle Ages. It was the personal name of the Crusader who in 1100 became the first Christian king of Jerusalem, and of four more Crusader kings of Jerusalem. It was also borne by Baldwin, Count of Flanders (1172–1205), leader of the Fourth Crusade, who became first Latin Emperor of Constantinople (1204). In North America, this surname has absorbed Dutch forms such as Boudewijn.
Irish: surname adopted in Donegal by bearers of the Gaelic surname Ó Maolagáin (see Milligan ), due to association of Gaelic maol ‘bald, hairless’ with English bald.
History: A John Baldwin from Buckinghamshire, England, arrived in the US in 1638 and settled in Milford, CT.

variants.name: Milligan
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maolagáin ‘descendant of Maoileagán’, a personal name from a double diminutive of maol meaning ‘bald’ or ‘tonsured’.

variants.name: Baldovino
meanings: Hispanic (mainly Philippines and Colombia) and Italian: from the personal name Baldovino, from ancient Germanic Baldowin (see Baldwin ).

variants.name: Bellmann
meanings: North German:
habitational name for someone from Belle in Westphalia, Bell in the Rhineland, or Bellen near Bremen.
in Saxony, from a pet form of the ancient Germanic personal name   Baldwin  .

variants.name: Bais
meanings: Dutch (mainly North Holland): patronymic from the personal name Baije, which is a derivative of an ancient Germanic name beginning with the element bern- ‘bear’, or possibly a variant of Boije, which may be a derivative of Boidin and thus a variant of Baldwin .
Italian (Friuli Venezia Giulia and Trentino-South Tyrol): nickname derived from German weiss ‘white’.

Americanized form of Croatian and Slovenian Bajs: nickname from dialect bajs ‘bass’ (the musical instrument), figuratively ‘fatty, potbelly’. The surname in the form Bais is found in Croatia, too, where it is a less common variant.

variants.name: Baudoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Etienne, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Firmin, Francoise, Jean-Yves, Laurent, Minos, Sylvain.
French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements bald ‘bold, brave’ + win ‘friend’ (see Baldwin ). Compare Boudoin 1 and Bowdoin .
Altered form of French   Beaudoin  , a cognate (variant) of 1 above.

variants.name: Bald
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Inge, Karl-Heinz, Konrad, Kurt, Otto.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Baldo, or a short form of various compound names such as Baldwin , formed with the first element bald ‘bold, strong’.

Scottish and English: from the Norman personal name Bald(e), Baud(e), occasionally Bold, a short form of the common ancient Germanic personal names Baldwin or Baldric, or possibly a survival of Old English Beald (compare Balding ); the relevant element in each of these is b(e)ald ‘brave’. As a hereditary surname it seems to have died out in England but survives in Scotland.

variants.name: Balkin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Emanuel, Herschel.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the Yiddish female personal name Beyle meaning ‘beautiful’ (related to French belle).

English (of Norman origin): perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Baldekin, Baudekin, an Anglo-Norman borrowing of Middle Dutch Baudequin, a Flemish pet form of Baldwin . However, a clear link between Middle English Baudekin and post-medieval Balkin has not been established, and the modern name may have a different source, a variant of Balcom perhaps, by migration.

variants.name: Bawden
meanings: English: from a late variant of the Norman personal name   Baldwin   or a variant of   Bowden  .

variants.name: Baldon
meanings: English: habitational name from either Marsh Baldon or Toot Baldon in Oxfordshire, from the Old English personal name Bealda + dūn ‘hill’, or a variant of Baldwin . Occasionally the name may be from Baildon in Yorkshire (named with Old English bēgel ‘bend’ + dūn ‘hill’; recorded as Baldon in the 16th century), or from Ballidon in Derbyshire (named with Old English belg ‘bag, sack’ + denu ‘valley’).
English: variant of   Boldon  .
Italian (Veneto): from an augmentative of the personal name   Baldo  .

variants.name: Beaudoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Marcel, Andre, Serge, Jacques, Gilles, Laurent, Normand, Pierre, Alcide, Lucien, Raoul.

French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements bald ‘bold, brave’ + win ‘friend’ (see Baldwin ). Compare Baudoin , Baudouin , Beaudion , Boadway , Boardway , Bodeau , Bodoh , Bodway , Boudway , and Budway .

nameMeanings.name: Timothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form, used in the Authorized Version of the Bible (alongside the Latin form Timotheus), of the Greek name Timotheos, from timē ‘honour’ + theos ‘god’. This was the name of a companion of St Paul; according to tradition, he was stoned to death for denouncing the worship of Diana . It was not used in England before the Reformation but has been in steady use since the 18th century.

historicEvents.description: Oldest grave seen in memorials list.

en.lifeSummary: When Ensign Timothy Baldwin was born on 20 November 1689, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Timothy Baldwin, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Hill, was 28. He married Hannah Richardson on 10 June 1713, in Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 3 December 1750, in Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 61, and was buried in Old Burying Ground, Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ensign Timothy Baldwin est né le 20 novembre 1689, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Timothy Baldwin, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hill, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Richardson le 10 juin 1713, à Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 3 décembre 1750, à Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Old Burying Ground, Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ensign Timothy Baldwin am 20. November 1689 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Timothy Baldwin 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Hill 28. Er hat am 10. Juni 1713 in Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Hannah Richardson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Dezember 1750 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Old Burying Ground, Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ensign Timothy Baldwin è nato il il 20 novembre 1689 nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Timothy Baldwin, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Hill, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Hannah Richardson il 10 giugno 1713, nel Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 3 dicembre 1750, nel Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Old Burying Ground, Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Unit: アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスストーネハム
ja.Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay C: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスストーネハム
ja.Old Burying Ground, Stoneham, Middlesex,: アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスストーネハムオルド ブリイング グロウンド

ja.Stoneham,, Suffolk, Massachusetts: アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスストーネハム
ja.lifeSummary: Ensign Timothy Baldwinが1689年11月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで生まれた時，父Timothy Baldwinは28歳，母Elizabeth Hillは28歳であった。1713年6月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスストーネハムでHannah Richardsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1750年12月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスストーネハムで61歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスストーネハムオルド ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 스톤함
ko.Old Burying Ground, Stoneham, Middlesex,: 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 스톤함 드 버이잉 그라운드
ko.Billerica, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 빌레리카
ko.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.lifeSummary: Ensign Timothy Baldwin(이)가 1689년 11월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Timothy Baldwin(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Hill(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1713년 6월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 스톤함에서 Hannah Richardson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1750년 12월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 스톤함에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 스톤함 드 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ensign Timothy Baldwin nasceu em 20 de novembro de 1689, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Timothy Baldwin, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hill, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Richardson em 10 de junho de 1713, em Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de dezembro de 1750, em Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Burying Ground, Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay C: стоунэам, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Old Burying Ground, Stoneham, Middlesex,: олд буринг гроунд, стоунэам, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ensign Timothy Baldwin родился 20 ноября 1689 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Timothy Baldwin было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hill, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Richardson 10 июня 1713 г. в местности стоунэам, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 3 декабря 1750 г. в местности стоунэам, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности олд буринг гроунд, стоунэам, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ensign Timothy Baldwin nació el 20 de noviembre de 1689, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Timothy Baldwin, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Hill, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Hannah Richardson el 10 de junio de 1713, en Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 3 de diciembre de 1750, en Stoneham, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Old Burying Ground, Stoneham, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
